title: IRS
description: The IRS is haunting us... help...
body:
This is a horror mod… about paying your taxes.

I don’t know anymore. They won’t leave me alone. They never will…

![The Papers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd268ae2e482532a428a8fd66924baa12585cb85_0.webp)

The IRS adds a few absolutely TERRIFYING and HORRIFYING entities to Minecraft, like the Tax Collector, who comes for you if you don’t pay your taxes within one in-game day. Ignore them… and face the consequences.

!! Headphones strongly recommended for the full experience !!

Why play this mod?

- Because evading your taxes fun.

- Because nothing in Minecraft has ever made you feel this amount of fear.

- Because Pablo loves you.

Warning:

- Very early in development--bugs are expected.

- This is for entertainment only; don’t try tax evasion in real life.

- Pay your taxes, or… don’t, but know the consequences are coming.
